story: An opening image introduces a malificent in a world full of possibility. A sudden problem interrupts a malificent and creates a clear mission. A malificent follows a clue into a striking new place. A difficult choice tests a malificent when the journey becomes dangerous. A malificent discovers the courage needed to change the outcome.
